data.description:
## Problem
After identity.require_authenticated was re-enabled in 95cbc7bb4 (its own pre-merge whole-store gate reported 0 enforced-not-verified at 15:09, tickets-branch anchor 0cf8c035 pinned 15:06), the Gerrit Verified 'verify-identity (whole-store authorship gate)' job now FAILS on subsequent changes. Failing run 29619412488 (gerrit-verify, main): every other job green; only verify-identity fails.

Authoritative symptom (job 88011317607):
  verify-identity: 602 verified, 4958 unsigned, 0 unknown-author, 0 bad-signature, 206 key-not-valid-at-era (5766 in scope) -> exit 1

Enforced (non-grandfathered) failures fall in TWO classes — the SAME two the prior rollback b77ef8c5d named and 4cc3ffbbb claimed to fix:
  1. key_not_valid_at_era on compacted (ledger) entries across many tickets (jira-reb-977/e622/568c/6fe2/...), ~200.
  2. unsigned on rec-0000/*-COMPLETION_VERDICT.json sidecars (live-file refs, not ledger) — should be dropped by the KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES filter at verify_authorship.py:349 yet appear.

## Immediate action (user-directed)
Land a Gerrit change setting identity.require_authenticated=false to make the gate advisory and unblock CI (documented rollback, no data cleanup). THEN continue hypothesis-driven root-cause via /rebar-debug.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Enforcement reverted to advisory on main; verify-identity job green on a fresh change.
- [ ] Proven, cited root cause for BOTH failure classes (why the 4cc3ffbbb fixes did not hold post-re-enablement).
- [ ] RED->GREEN regression test per class before any re-enablement.
- [ ] Re-enablement only after 'rebar verify-identity' reports 0 enforced-not-verified whole-store.
data.title: verify-identity gate re-fails under require_authenticated: key_not_valid_at_era (compacted ledger) + unsigned rec-0000 COMPLETION_VERDICT sidecars regressed after re-enablement (95cbc7bb4)
